split.name: Split String
split.description: Split a string into a list by delimiter

join.name: Join Strings
join.description: Join a list of strings with a delimiter

trim.name: Trim
trim.description: Remove whitespace or specified characters from string

format_string.name: Format String
format_string.description: Format a string template with named placeholders

length.name: String Length
length.description: Get the length of a string

check_string.name: Check String
check_string.description: Check if a string matches a condition (contains, starts_with, ends_with)

change_case.name: Change Case
change_case.description: Convert string to upper, lower, title, or capitalize case

regex_operation.name: Regex Operation
regex_operation.description: Perform regex match, find all, or replace operations

substring.name: Substring
substring.description: Extract a substring by start index and length

find_index.name: Find Index
find_index.description: Find the index of a substring

pad.name: Pad
pad.description: Pad a string to a target length

is_empty.name: Is Empty
is_empty.description: Check if a string is empty

remove_duplicates.name: Remove Duplicates
remove_duplicates.description: Remove duplicate strings from a list
